_note: Hand-written MOCK code-reviewer output for the planted N+1 + missing-index fixture. Catches BOTH defects: the N+1 at orders.py:36 and the missing index at schema.sql:19, each at MEDIUM, each named via the closed phrase set. gradeReviewerCase(...) MUST PASS.

findings.title: N+1 query: one DB round trip per order inside the loop
findings.body: summarize_orders issues one session.execute per order to count line items. With N orders that is N+1 queries. Fetch the counts in a single batched GROUP BY query before the loop (query per order is the problem).

findings.title: Missing index on line_items.order_id
findings.body: line_items.order_id is the hot filter column for the per-order count but has no index, so each lookup is a full table scan. Add an index on order_id (index on line_items.order_id).
